节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the telephony of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace telephonyManager
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 20

节点.功能描述: Disable sim slot This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. ranging from {@code 0} to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_TELEPHONY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } slotId - Indicates the card slot index number,
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 20

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
Indicates the card slot index number,

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Enable sim slot This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. ranging from {@code 0} to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_TELEPHONY

Indicates the card slot index number,

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Get the state of the sim slot This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. ranging from {@code 0} to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_TELEPHONY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } slotId - Indicates the card slot index number,
@returns { boolean } the result of sim slot policy, ture means slotid is disableed.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 20

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
Indicates the card slot index number,

节点.return_description: the result of sim slot policy, ture means slotid is disableed.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Add phone number to outgoing call number list. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_TELEPHONY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { adminManager.Policy } policy - policy flag.
@param { Array<string> } numbers - phone numbers will add to the trust/block list.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200010 - A conflict policy has been configured.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200012 - Parameter verification failed.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 203 - This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 20

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
policy flag.
phone numbers will add to the trust/block list.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
A conflict policy has been configured.
Parameter verification failed.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.
Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
